mapper.update: UPDATE order_tickets ot SET ticket_used = true, ticket_used_date = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{resultDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') FROM order_items oi WHERE ot.order_item_id = oi.id And oi.partner_id = '85f50a52-7096-470e-95f5-a8e9c1cd6589' AND ot.partner_order_code = #{orderSales} AND ot.ticket_used = false
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT o.id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN order_item_coupons oic ON oi.id = oic.order_item_id JOIN ticket_coupons tc ON oic.ticket_coupon_id = tc.id WHERE oi.partner_id = '0f46cad1-6fb4-4514-938f-d309850f0668' AND tc.used_at IS NULL AND o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'
mapper.update: UPDATE order_tickets ot SET ticket_used = true, ticket_used_date = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{resultDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') FROM order_items oi WHERE ot.order_item_id = oi.id AND oi.partner_id = '0f46cad1-6fb4-4514-938f-d309850f0668' AND ot.ticket_number = #{couponNo} AND ot.ticket_used = false
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT o.id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN order_tickets ot ON ot.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE oi.partner_id = 'e8e6f928-ebe2-44f9-930c-4a3f9a061b3c' AND ot.ticket_used = false AND o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'
mapper.update: UPDATE order_tickets ot SET ticket_used = true, ticket_used_date = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{resultDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') FROM order_items oi WHERE ot.order_item_id = oi.id AND oi.partner_id = 'e8e6f928-ebe2-44f9-930c-4a3f9a061b3c' AND ot.ticket_number = #{couponNo} AND ot.ticket_used = false
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT o.order_number FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN order_tickets ot ON ot.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE oi.partner_id = 'bd0e1a6e-b871-44a0-827c-f44c0d82f3f4' AND ot.ticket_used = false AND o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'
mapper.update: UPDATE order_tickets ot SET ticket_used = true, ticket_used_date = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{resultDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') FROM order_items oi WHERE ot.order_item_id = oi.id AND oi.partner_id = 'bd0e1a6e-b871-44a0-827c-f44c0d82f3f4' AND ot.ticket_number = #{couponNo} AND ot.ticket_used = false
